chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. D – 41 of 2023 Cr. Rev. App. No. D – 51 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Cr. Rev. App. No. D-41 of 2023 For hearing of main case 1. For hearing of MA No.872/2023 (561-A CrPC) 2. For hearing of main case Cr. Rev. App. No. D-51 of 2023 For hearing of main case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.971/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Syed Ali Murtaza Shah, Advocate for applicant in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-41 of 2023. Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for applicants in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-51 of 2023. Mr. Athar Abbas Solangi, Advocate for respondent No.2 in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-41 of 2023 and for respondent No.3 in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-51 of 2023. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicant in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-41 of 2023 has filed a statement along with a volume of documents. After hearing these revision applications, the same are disposed of with consent in the terms whereby, since already the applicants in their statements U/S 342 CrPC have given the names of witnesses in defense, they would be summoned by the trial Court and examined as defense witnesses. If some of them are holding some official position, they would also be summoned and examined as defense witnesses, in accordance with law. Both revision applications are disposed of along with listed applications, in above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
